slides.text:
What's to say Lord it's You gave me life
Can't explain just how much You mean to me now
That You have saved me Lord
I give that all I am to You
That everyday would be a light and shine Your name
slides.label: Verse 1

slides.text:
Everyday, it's You I live for
Everyday, I'll follow after You
Everyday, I'll walk with You my Lord
slides.label: Chorus

slides.text:
Everyday Lord I'll learn to stand upon Your Word
And pray that I might come to know You more
That You would guide me in every single step I take
That everyday can be a light unto Your world
slides.label: Verse 2
